recommendations.title: Lost in La Mancha
recommendations.overview: Fulton and Pepe's 2000 documentary captures Terry Gilliam's attempt to get The Man Who Killed Don Quixote off the ground. Back injuries, freakish storms, and more zoom in to sabotage the project.

recommendations.title: Reign of the Supermen
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Action, Fantasy, Drama
recommendations.overview: In the wake of The Death of Superman, the world is still mourning the loss of the Man of Steel following his fatal battle with the monster Doomsday. However, no sooner as his body been laid to rest than do four new bearers of the Superman shield come

recommendations.title: Superman II: The Richard Donner Cut
recommendations.overview: Superman agrees to sacrifice his powers to start a relationship with Lois Lane, unaware that three Kryptonian criminals he inadvertently released are conquering Earth.

recommendations.title: For the Love of Spock
recommendations.overview: The life of Mr. Spock, as well as that of Leonard Nimoy, the actor who played him for almost fifty years, written and directed by his son: Adam.

recommendations.title: Lethal Weapon 2
recommendations.overview: Riggs and Murtaugh are on the trail of South African diplomats using their immunity to engage in criminal activities.

recommendations.title: What Happened, Miss Simone?
recommendations.overview: The film chronicles Nina Simone's journey from child piano prodigy to iconic musician and passionate activist, told in her own words.

recommendations.title: Winter on Fire: Ukraine's Fight for Freedom
recommendations.overview: Over 93 days in Ukraine, what started as peaceful student demonstrations became a violent revolution and full-fledged civil rights movement.

recommendations.title: The Goonies
recommendations.overview: Young teen Mikey Walsh and his friends set off on a quest to find Pirate One-Eyed Willie's treasure in hopes of saving their homes from demolition. However, on their quest to find the treasure, they run into a family of recently escaped criminals, de

recommendations.title: The Death of "Superman Lives": What Happened?
recommendations.overview: The Death of 'Superman Lives': What Happened? feature film documents the process of development of the ill fated "Superman Lives" movie, that was to be directed by Tim Burton and star Nicolas Cage as the man of steel himself, Superman. The project we

recommendations.title: Born on the Fourth of July
recommendations.overview: Paralyzed in the Vietnam war, Ron Kovic becomes an anti-war and pro-human rights political activist after feeling betrayed by the country he fought for.
